agentPlayground.title: Agent playground
agentPlayground.description: Test and debug your AI agents

empty.title: No agents yet
empty.description: Create your first agent to get started.

content.connectedTooltip: Your agent is connected to Opik
content.executionInProgressDescription: Your agent is currently running. Leaving now will interrupt the execution and may result in an incomplete trace. Are you sure you want to leave?

emptyState.connectDescription: Link your agent to Opik to start using the Agent playground and improve performance.
emptyState.markEntrypoint: Mark your agent as an entrypoint
emptyState.markEntrypointDescription: Add <track>@opik.track(entrypoint=True)</track> to your agent's main function so Opik can detect and register it. You can also run <instrument>/instrument</instrument> in the Ollie sidebar to auto-instrument your agent.
emptyState.runConnectionDescription: Install and run the Opik connector in your terminal (works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, and more):
emptyState.waitingDescription: We'll automatically detect your agent once it's connected.

inputForm.noInputFields: No input fields defined by this agent.

promptCard.missingPermission: Missing permission to create new versions of {{name}}

promptsList.noPrompts: No prompts in this project yet.

result.agentResponseAppear: The agent response will appear here after a run
result.resultsAppearWhenDone: Results will appear here when it's done.
